implementation_notes: Business identity; never use provider user id as domain foreign key.
Code-defined key mirrored for admin display.
Fine-grained scoped grant; optional resource/geo scope.
Actor, action, target, before/after hash, request id, IP risk metadata.
Child/member data minimized; age stage preferred over birthdate in discovery.
Derived score explanation; no sensitive raw feature dump.
Text encrypted at rest by platform storage; excluded from analytics.
Creates contextual conversation after policy checks.
Partner/native catalog product; never P2P Listing.
Immutable order number and totals snapshot.
Unique provider event id; safe retries.
Versioned schema; no prohibited sensitive payload.
Operational record, not queue implementation itself.
Storage key, MIME, size, checksum, variants.
